_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in identifying how a target communicates.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building and presenting AI proof-of-concept demonstrations to executive audiences, communicating capability, limitations, and path to production.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-019 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-010 (AI, cosine: 0.484), AI-S-008 (AI, cosine: 0.468).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.1/10 (raw 0.414). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [communicates, identifying, target] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, audiences, building, capability, communicating, concept] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.900, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.041 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.6%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in identifying how a target communicates." and "Skill in building and presenting AI proof-of-concept demonstrations to executive". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.484 > STS 0.414 (gap +0.070). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [communicates, identifying, target]. WIDAI-only: [ai, audiences, building, capability, communicating, concept].
